concrete_cement_and_masonry.notes: Largest category. Pavers, retaining wall systems, and CMU blocks each have enormous SKU depth.

subcategories.notes: Many block types: standard, lightweight, split face, bond beam, specialty.
Very wide variety — concrete, natural stone, pattern collections.

tier3.display_name: Concrete Pavers (Holland, Diamond, Plaza, Weston, etc.)

subcategories.notes: Highly brand-specific — Cambridge, Sigma, Belvedere, Olde English, etc.

tier3.display_name: Lehigh Color Systems (M, N, S, Portland)
Outdoor Kitchen Wall Systems (MAYTRX, OE Wall)

tools.notes: Second largest category. Masonry tools especially deep.

tier3.display_name: Breakers & Demolition Tools (Hilti TE, DeWalt Pavement Breaker)

subcategories.notes: Very deep inventory — many styles and sizes of trowels, floats, screeds.

tier3.display_name: Trowels (Brick, Pool, Margin, Finishing, Inside Corner)
Squares & Rafter Tools (Rafter Square, Carpenter Square)
Hammers & Mallets (Brick Hammer, Drilling Hammer, Estwing)
Wrenches & Pliers (Pipe Wrench, Adjustable, Long Nose)
Specialty Woodworking Tools (Draw Knife, Tenon Cutter, Forstner Bit)
Bit Holders, Nut Setters & Magnetic Tips

subcategories.notes: Added based on actual items — many broom and brush SKUs in the data.

tier3.display_name: Push Brooms & Street Brooms (24", 16" poly, tampico)
Brushes (Pot Brush, Wire Brush, Chip Brush)
Scrapers & Floor Tools (Floor Scraper, Red Devil)

timber_logs_and_specialty_wood.notes: Slabs drill by species. Peeled logs drill by finish type. Heavy timbers drill by species/dimension.

subcategories.notes: 4x4 and larger structural timbers — DF #2, 4x4 to 10x10.
Drill by species.

tier3.display_name: Mixed Hardwood Slabs (Cherry, Elm, Ash, Sycamore, etc.)
Hardwood Firewood (Mesquite, Oak, Pecan, Acacia, Ash)
Mixed Hardwood Boards (Oak, Maple, Ash, Walnut — rough)
Decorative Slabs & Wood Rounds (Maple Cookie, Carob)
Joist Tape (Ogden Deck Depot Butyl Tape)
Stair Rail Kits (Deckorators Rapid Stair Kit)
Flat Iron Corral Panels (light, medium duty, 5-rail)
Split Rail Posts (Line, Corner, End, Blank)

metals_and_metal_fabrication.notes: Dominated by A500/A513 square and rectangular steel tubing in many sizes. Tier-3 organizes by size range.

tier3.display_name: Angle Iron (1"×1" to 4"×3", various wall thickness)
End Caps, Square Caps & Domed Caps
Wood & Sheet Metal Screws (#9, wafer head)

Log & Timber Stains (CAP, CAP Flex — many colors)
Heavy Duty Masonry Paint (Quickrete — gray & white)

Epoxy Pigments (Black, Brick Red, Brown, White)
Maximal Expanding Foam — Fill & Seal (DOW, Fischer, Powers)
General Construction Adhesives (3M High Strength, 15 Premium Mastic)
